title: phacelia patuliflora var. teucriifolia
intro: Phacelia patuliflora var. teucriifolia, also known as Lophosia, is a perennial plant belonging to the borage family and native to the southwestern United States. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties that can be used to treat wounds and skin irritations. The health benefits of Phacelia patuliflora var. teucriifolia include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and salves, which can be used to soothe skin conditions, reduce pain, and promote overall well-being.
